productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Flow Grey Black Backpacks
description: A perfect lightweight backpack to carry to office or for MBA classes, the puma Flow Backpack has ample space to hold your laptop along with its charger and other accessories. You can store your notebooks or other essentials in the additional chamber in the front, while the ergonomically constructed backstraps sit comfortably, keeping you safe from any nagging backache. Length: 31 cm Made of polyester and nylon, with a nylon lining for durability and easy cleaning Branded zippers and sliders for easy use and longer life of the bag One main copiously spaced velcro strap enclosed compartment for laptop One front zippered compartment with multiple pouches Synthetic haul loop for handling ease Wide, adjustable padded handles and padded back for carrying ease and to protect the shoulders and back from injuries Branding in screen print across the length of the front pocket Care only hand wash Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wring Line dry Do not iron
